title: Fix Pay Now button not showing in CartSidebar

requirements.text: Fix the Pay Now button in CartSidebar so it is visible and functional on all devices, including mobile. The button should appear in the cart panel when items are in the cart and trigger the UPI deep link flow. Ensure it is not hidden by CSS, conditional rendering logic, or z-index/overflow issues.

quotes: its not working payment option is not showing

acceptanceCriteria: The Pay Now button is visible in the CartSidebar on mobile devices when the cart contains at least one item.
The Pay Now button is visible on desktop as well.
Tapping/clicking the Pay Now button on mobile initiates the UPI deep link flow.
No layout overflow or z-index issue hides the button on small screens.
The button renders consistently across common mobile viewport sizes (e.g., 375px, 414px width).

requirements.text: Audit the PaymentPage UPI settings fetch: if UPI settings are missing or empty, display a user-friendly fallback message instead of a blank or broken payment UI, so users always understand the payment state.
acceptanceCriteria: If UPI settings are not configured, the PaymentPage shows a clear message (e.g., 'Payment is currently unavailable. Please contact the restaurant.') instead of a blank screen.
If UPI settings are available, the normal payment flow is displayed without errors.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not change the backend schema or UPI data model.
nonGoals: Adding new payment methods or third-party payment gateways.
Redesigning the cart UI beyond fixing the Pay Now button visibility.
Changing the UPI deep link logic itself unless it is directly causing the button to not render.
